data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet for a fantasy RPG enemy. Canvas is exactly a 2x2 grid with 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Flat solid chroma-key background #FF00FF only, no texture, no shadow, no floor, no borders, no visible grid lines.

Subject: normal style ranged enemy for Samsara Ascension: a corrupted xianxia spell archer. Narrow agile silhouette, dark teal and ash robe, small bow or talisman focus kept close to the body, clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG sprite, readable at small size, not cute, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art.

Pose/frame requirements: full body visible in every cell, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, same body height and same pixel scale across all frames, stable grounded feet anchor line, subject fills about 58–66% of each cell with generous magenta margin. Entire subject and all attached elements must fit fully inside each cell; nothing may cross any cell edge.

Animation frames: 
1) top-left: attack wind-up or casting wind-up, body crouches/coils, weapon/focus/energy pulled close.
2) top-right: compact strike/release, body lunges or snaps forward, effects stay tight and attached.
3) bottom-left: follow-through with clear recoil, cloth/hair momentum, no wide detached effect.
4) bottom-right: guard or recovery pose, ready to loop back into combat.

Consistency: preserve exact same identity, silhouette family, palette, face/eyes/core face, costume marks, weapon/focus, and material language in every frame. Only pose, compact cloth motion, limbs, hair, petals, weapon angle, and small attached aura may change.

Forbidden: text, labels, numbers, arrows, UI, watermark, visible grid, extra characters, cropped body parts, inconsistent scale, redesigned subject, alternate forms, photorealism, 3D render, pixel art. No detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud.
